title: Operation Starshield
premise: A world-saving rocket carrying humanity's continuity archive is preparing to launch. Hostile actors are attempting to corrupt the launch chain across CyberWorld.

operation.name: Operation Starshield
operation.primaryObjective: Recover the first launch-auth fragments and stabilize the convoy route to the Starshield uplink.
operation.brief: The Starshield launch chain is under active multi-actor interference. Every recovered fragment feeds the final rocket uplink.
ticker: VOLT TYPHOON PRE-POSITIONING DETECTED IN RELAY LAYER
LAZARUS ACTIVITY SURGING NEAR ESCROW VAULTS
SANDWORM SIGNATURES OBSERVED IN TELEMETRY MIRROR
FLLC REQUEST: ALL OPERATIVES REPORT TO THE NEXUS

chapters.title: Signal Drift
chapters.summary: A degraded broadcast from a dying node contains the first fragment of the Starshield launch-auth package.

chapters.title: Broken Routes
chapters.summary: FLLC operatives trace the convoy path through compromised relays and legacy infrastructure.

chapters.title: Launch Chain
chapters.summary: Adversaries converge on telemetry relays, trust anchors, and validator nodes tied to the Starshield rocket.

chapters.title: Final Ascent
chapters.summary: Secure the final uplink and prevent corruption of Starshield launch validation before ignition.

worldStatus.currentThreatState: Multi-front adversary pressure across relay, telecom, and archive infrastructure.
worldStatus.currentMissionObjective: Recover and verify launch-auth fragment A1 before relay collapse.
worldStatus.factionReputationEffects: Sentinel reputation improves defensive mission rewards. Corsair reputation unlocks risky shortcut routes. Ghostline reputation lowers detection during escort runs.
worldEvents: Telemetry drift detected over GovArchive mirror cluster.
Lazarus wallets funding proxy operators in escrow corridors.
Volt Typhoon signatures found in dormant relay firmware.
Nexus command requests additional scanner toolsmith volunteers.
